name: ok-plugins
description: Custom Claude Code plugins by akurinnoy

plugins.name: ok-pr-review
plugins.description: Two-stage PR review: standard review for correctness and security, then deep review for design quality, testing rigor, and anti-patterns

plugins.name: ok-prerelease-verification
plugins.description: Generates manual step-by-step verification instructions for confirming a GitHub PR fix is correctly included in a DWO prerelease build
